prompt.content: I want to assess how macro indicators differ across risk regimes. First, identify two inflection points (A/B share collapse or D/F share expand to ~60%) from the chart in 1.11.2026 Habor Capital Final.pdf, then combine three source SQL tables: macro_economic_labor_rates, macro_economic_inflation_prices, and macro_economic_activity_markets (normalizing their date formats into a common Month_Key). Use the two inflection points to label Risk_period: baseline (before the first inflection), low risk collapse (from the first inflection through the month before the second), and high risk expand (from the second inflection onward). Finally, report eta‑squared (effect size) for five focus indicators (Unemployment_Rate, CPI_Inflation, Fed_Funds_Rate, TenY_Treasury_Yield, Retail_Sales_Growth) using between‑group vs total variance. Round all reported values in two decimals. Perform the analysis in SQLite and include both the SQLite script and the results.

rubrics.name: Reports the eta‑squared (effect size) for Unemployment_Rate as 0.85 (+/-0.02) (ver_236f5b72bfcf4c6686b732e83b0e8655)

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
eta_squared_unemployment |      eta_squared_cpi | eta_squared_fed_funds |    eta_squared_ten_y | eta_squared_retail_sales
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                0.85                         |                 0.86           |                 0.42                 |                 0.62            |               0.89


```
-- Clean, combine three source tables, then compute eta-squared by risk period

WITH
-- Normalize labor table Month_Date -> Month_Key (YYYY-MM)
labor_clean AS (
  SELECT
    SUBSTR(Month_Date, 1, 7) AS Month_Key,
    Prime_Rate,
    Unemployment_Rate,
    Fed_Funds_Rate
  FROM macro_economic_labor_rates
),

-- Normalize inflation table Month_Label -> Month_Key (YYYY-MM)
inflation_clean AS (
  SELECT
    CASE SUBSTR(Month_Label, 1, 3)
      WHEN 'Jan' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-01'
      WHEN 'Feb' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-02'
      WHEN 'Mar' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-03'
      WHEN 'Apr' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-04'
      WHEN 'May' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-05'
      WHEN 'Jun' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-06'
      WHEN 'Jul' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-07'
      WHEN 'Aug' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-08'
      WHEN 'Sep' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-09'
      WHEN 'Oct' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-10'
      WHEN 'Nov' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-11'
      WHEN 'Dec' THEN SUBSTR(Month_Label, 5, 4) || '-12'
    END AS Month_Key,
    CPI_Inflation,
    PPI_Inflation
  FROM macro_economic_inflation_prices
),

-- Normalize activity table Month_Period -> Month_Key (YYYY-MM)
activity_clean AS (
  SELECT
    REPLACE(Month_Period, '/', '-') AS Month_Key,
    TenY_Treasury_Yield,
    Retail_Sales_Growth,
    Consumer_Confidence,
    Housing_Starts_Index,
    Industrial_Production_Growth
  FROM macro_economic_activity_markets
),

-- Join all cleaned sources on Month_Key
macro_all AS (
  SELECT
    l.Month_Key,
    l.Prime_Rate,
    l.Unemployment_Rate,
    i.CPI_Inflation,
    i.PPI_Inflation,
    l.Fed_Funds_Rate,
    a.TenY_Treasury_Yield,
    a.Retail_Sales_Growth,
    a.Consumer_Confidence,
    a.Housing_Starts_Index,
    a.Industrial_Production_Growth
  FROM labor_clean l
  JOIN inflation_clean i ON i.Month_Key = l.Month_Key
  JOIN activity_clean a ON a.Month_Key = l.Month_Key
),

-- Apply risk period labels and select focus indicators
macro_with_risk AS (
  SELECT
    Month_Key,
    CASE
      WHEN Month_Key < '2023-10' THEN 'baseline'
      WHEN Month_Key < '2024-06' THEN 'low risk collapse'
      ELSE 'high risk expand'
    END AS Risk_period,
    Unemployment_Rate,
    CPI_Inflation,
    Fed_Funds_Rate,
    TenY_Treasury_Yield,
    Retail_Sales_Growth
  FROM macro_all
),

-- Compute global means for eta-squared
overall AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(Unemployment_Rate) AS mean_unemp,
    AVG(CPI_Inflation) AS mean_cpi,
    AVG(Fed_Funds_Rate) AS mean_ffr,
    AVG(TenY_Treasury_Yield) AS mean_10y,
    AVG(Retail_Sales_Growth) AS mean_retail
  FROM macro_with_risk
),

-- Compute group means and within-group variance components
group_stats AS (
  SELECT
    Risk_period,
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(Unemployment_Rate) AS grp_unemp,
    AVG(CPI_Inflation) AS grp_cpi,
    AVG(Fed_Funds_Rate) AS grp_ffr,
    AVG(TenY_Treasury_Yield) AS grp_10y,
    AVG(Retail_Sales_Growth) AS grp_retail,
    AVG((Unemployment_Rate - (SELECT mean_unemp FROM overall)) *
        (Unemployment_Rate - (SELECT mean_unemp FROM overall))) AS var_unemp,
    AVG((CPI_Inflation - (SELECT mean_cpi FROM overall)) *
        (CPI_Inflation - (SELECT mean_cpi FROM overall))) AS var_cpi,
    AVG((Fed_Funds_Rate - (SELECT mean_ffr FROM overall)) *
        (Fed_Funds_Rate - (SELECT mean_ffr FROM overall))) AS var_ffr,
    AVG((TenY_Treasury_Yield - (SELECT mean_10y FROM overall)) *
        (TenY_Treasury_Yield - (SELECT mean_10y FROM overall))) AS var_10y,
    AVG((Retail_Sales_Growth - (SELECT mean_retail FROM overall)) *
        (Retail_Sales_Growth - (SELECT mean_retail FROM overall))) AS var_retail
  FROM macro_with_risk
  GROUP BY Risk_period
),

-- Sum of squares between groups
ss_between AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(n * (grp_unemp - (SELECT mean_unemp FROM overall)) *
            (grp_unemp - (SELECT mean_unemp FROM overall))) AS ssb_unemp,
    SUM(n * (grp_cpi - (SELECT mean_cpi FROM overall)) *
            (grp_cpi - (SELECT mean_cpi FROM overall))) AS ssb_cpi,
    SUM(n * (grp_ffr - (SELECT mean_ffr FROM overall)) *
            (grp_ffr - (SELECT mean_ffr FROM overall))) AS ssb_ffr,
    SUM(n * (grp_10y - (SELECT mean_10y FROM overall)) *
            (grp_10y - (SELECT mean_10y FROM overall))) AS ssb_10y,
    SUM(n * (grp_retail - (SELECT mean_retail FROM overall)) *
            (grp_retail - (SELECT mean_retail FROM overall))) AS ssb_retail
  FROM group_stats
),

-- Total sum of squares
ss_total AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(n * var_unemp) AS sst_unemp,
    SUM(n * var_cpi) AS sst_cpi,
    SUM(n * var_ffr) AS sst_ffr,
    SUM(n * var_10y) AS sst_10y,
    SUM(n * var_retail) AS sst_retail
  FROM group_stats
)

-- Final eta-squared (rounded) for five indicators
SELECT
  ROUND(ssb_unemp / NULLIF(sst_unemp, 0), 2) AS eta_squared_unemployment,
  ROUND(ssb_cpi / NULLIF(sst_cpi, 0), 2) AS eta_squared_cpi,
  ROUND(ssb_ffr / NULLIF(sst_ffr, 0), 2) AS eta_squared_fed_funds,
  ROUND(ssb_10y / NULLIF(sst_10y, 0), 2) AS eta_squared_ten_y,
  ROUND(ssb_retail / NULLIF(sst_retail, 0), 2) AS eta_squared_retail_sales
FROM ss_between, ss_total;

```
